title: Relapse prevention discussion documentation

examination.text: Supports documenting low mood, loss of interest, duration, course, functional, interpersonal and social difficulty, previous mood history, physical and mental comorbidity, sleep, stressful events, medicines, substances, loneliness and support.
examination.rationale: Supports comprehensive symptom, function and contextual reassessment for depression relapse-prevention discussion; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports documenting low mood, loss of interest, duration, course, functional, interpersonal and social difficulty, previous mood history, physical and mental comorbidity, sleep, stressful events, medicines, substances, loneliness and support.

source.title: Depression in adults: treatment and management — Recommendations

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1–1.2.7 — recognition, comprehensive assessment, function, and context

referral.text: Supports clinician-documented supportive discussion, questions, safety planning, treatment or medication decisions, monitoring, follow-up, and referral without autonomous treatment selection or doses.
referral.rationale: Supports clinician-led monitoring, management and referral context for depression relapse-prevention discussion; no decision is generated.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-documented supportive discussion, questions, safety planning, treatment or medication decisions, monitoring, follow-up, and referral without autonomous treatment selection or doses.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Depression

exact_section.heading: Sections 8–9 — clinician-led management, monitoring, and referral

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Condition, relapse history, early warning signs, triggers, protective factors, medicines, therapy, supports, crisis contacts, shared plan and follow-up remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for depression relapse-prevention discussion.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
